brainArchitectureProgress.basis: Local architecture estimate after Packet ABP: chat/voice context, multi-PDF injection, local observability ledgers, Admin diagnostics, tool-call records, evaluated-answer evidence, synthetic rehearsal, model-observation gates, durable local memory-worker queues, typed-chat/voice thread persistence proof, request-correlated transcript-save rows, and an Admin live-vs-synthetic brain-flow gap surface are implemented; deliberate provider-key chat/voice proof, broader beta validation, and AWS/cloud synchronization remain incomplete.
